goal: Screenshot this page. As a senior product designer, rate it /10. One-line verdict + one thing to improve. Dark SaaS dashboard.
summary:
**Design Rating: 6/10** — Tangle Cloud Instances Page

**One-line Verdict:** Professional dark SaaS dashboard with excellent color contrast (WCAG AAA) and clean typography, but critically undermined by invisible navigation active states that prevent users from identifying their current location at a glance.

**One Thing to Improve:** Add clear active state indicators to the sidebar navigation—implement a left accent border in brand color, slightly lighter background, or bold text weight for the current page (Instances) so users can instantly see where they are in the dashboard hierarchy without having to check the URL.
